extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.[CR]The author is in no way affiliated with Kodi, Team Kodi, or the XBMC Foundation.
extension.summary: POV Fork — What you like to watch.[CR]
extension.description: POV Fork — A maintained fork of the POV video addon for Kodi. This is a Non-profit resource, organized solely for educational purposes which is protected under the Fair-Use doctrine of the Copyright Act, Specifically section 107, which does promote freedom of expression, by permitting the unlicensed use of copyright-protected works.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within add-on.

extension.description: Proxies Kodi's web interface and selected management commands through an authenticated outbound WebSocket connection with diagnostics and binary-safe response handling.

extension.summary: Browse M3U with TMDB metadata + a built-in toolkit
extension.description: [B]Helix[/B] is a single Kodi add-on that fuses a clean, TMDB-driven browse experience with a full maintenance toolkit. Open one icon to browse Movies / TV / Anime with poster art and info, or flip to the Tools tab for Account Manager, Maintenance, Backup/Restore, Speedtest, Logs and more. The browse side speaks plain M3U playlists (point it at your own source) and resolves links through Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize or TorBox when configured.
extension.disclaimer: Helix is a content-neutral tool. It does not host, scrape or link to any third-party media. The user is responsible for the content of any M3U playlist or debrid service they configure.
extension.news: 0.1.1 - Service: M3U auto-refresh + cache+news polls on independent timers. Debrid: HTTP transport hardened (retry 5xx/429). New: repo/ + build_repo.sh + install_test.py + deploy_repo.sh. Removed empty skins/. Setting: source.m3u.auto_refresh (default true).
